LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. NOTWITHSTANDING CERTAIN EXCEPTIONS THAT ARE NOT APPLICABLE TO THIS ACTION, AN AWARD FOR WORKERS COMPENSATION BENEFITS IS EXEMPT. (CCP 704.160(A) & (B).) ACCORDINGLY, THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY LEVIED FUNDS FROM CHASE BANK TO DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR LOUIE. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: A. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-08-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Set For Trial On Nov-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMES MICHEL, ESQ., 415.239.4949, FOR DEFENDNAT STEVEN LOUIE; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STEVEN LOUIE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. Opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the court's order issued on April 24, 2014. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Continued To May-12-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert Cohen, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

Plaintiff's counsel requested that this matter and the matter on Line 5 on the calendar be heard on the same day. Because plaintiff did not give proper notice that he will appear today, the request was denied and the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STEVEN LOUIE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to May 12, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 24, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Apr-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
James A. Michel, Esq. of the Law Office of James A. Michel, Tel. 415.239.4949, for defendant/claimant;
Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., Tel. 510.985.9250, appearing specially for the plaintiff.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested by either party. PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is granted. Notwithstanding certain exceptions that are not applicable to this action, an award for workers compensation benefits is exempt. (CCP 704.160(a) & (b).) Accordingly, the Sheriff is directed to release any levied funds from Chase Bank to Defendant/Judgment Debtor Louie. Court to prepare order. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
